description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on push to main and tags, pull requests, and workflow dispatches. The workflow has read permissions to repository contents and consists of multiple jobs: lint_and_test, linux, musllinux, windows, macos, sdist, and release. The lint_and_test job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of Python versions, checking out submodules, setting up Python, building wheels, installing Just, running Cargo tests, and running pytest. Other jobs build and upload wheels for various platforms, and the release job publishes to PyPI if the workflow is triggered by a tag.
